title: oxalis corniculata var. ciliifera
intro: Oxalis corniculata var. ciliifera, also known as the small-flowered wood sorrel, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the wood sorrel family. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is traditionally used to treat various ailments such as fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues. The plant is rich in vitamins and minerals, including vitamin C and potassium, which contribute to its health benefits, including boosting the immune system and reducing oxidative stress. Oxalis corniculata var. ciliifera can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
